---
title: "Reproduce Bowles et al 2003"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: 
  html_document:
    theme: cerulean
    highlight: tango
---

We will compare two different version of the model describing in [Bowles et al (2023)](https://www.sciencedirect.com/science/article/pii/S0022519303000602)

```{r}
source("function.R")
source("core_model.R")
source("core_model_SE.R")
N=20
g=20
e=0.001
m=0.2
k=0.25
c=1
b=2
base=baseline=10

allgroups <- replicate(g,createGroup(N=N),simplify=F)
t=rep(0,g)
s=rep(0,g)
steps=generations=50
baseline=10
inmS=mu_s=.1
inmT=mu_t=.1


resultsSC <- model(allgroups,e=e,m=m,k=k,steps=steps,c=c,b=b,baseline=baseline,mu_s=mu_s,mu_t=mu_t,s=s,t=t,logs=c())
resultsSE <- run_simulation(group_size = N, ngroups = g, b = b, c = c, e = e, m = m, k = k, inmS = inmS, inmT=inmT, base = base,generations=generations)

plot(resultsSC[,1],type="l",lwd=2,col="red",ylim=c(0,1),ylab="q")
lines(resultsSE[1,],type="l",lwd=2,col="blue")
plot(resultsSC[,2],type="l",lwd=2,col="red",ylim=c(0,1),ylab="s")
lines(resultsSE[3,],type="l",lwd=2,col="blue")

resultsSC <- replicate(10,model(allgroups,e=e,m=m,k=k,steps=steps,c=c,b=b,baseline=baseline,mu_s=mu_s,mu_t=mu_t,s=s,t=t,logs=c()))
resultsSE <- replicate(10,run_simulation(group_size = N, ngroups = g, b = b, c = c, e = e, m = m, k = k, inmS = inmS, inmT=inmT, base = base,generations=generations))
plot(1,1,type="n",xlim=c(0,steps),ylim=c(0,1),ylab="q")
apply(resultsSC[,1,],2,lines,lwd=1,col="red")
apply(resultsSE[1,,],2,lines,lwd=1,col="blue")

plot(1,1,type="n",xlim=c(0,1000),ylim=c(0,1),ylim="s")
apply(resultsSC[,3,],2,lines,lwd=1,col="red")
apply(resultsSE[2,,],2,lines,lwd=1,col="blue")

plot(1,1,type="n",xlim=c(0,1000),ylim=c(0,1),ylim="t")
apply(resultsSC[,2,],2,lines,lwd=1,col="red")
apply(resultsSE[3,,],2,lines,lwd=1,col="blue")
``` 


```{r}
k=.01
resultsSC2 <- replicate(10,model(allgroups,e=e,m=m,k=k,steps=steps,c=c,b=b,baseline=baseline,mu_s=mu_s,mu_t=mu_t,s=s,t=t,logs=c()))

resultsSE2 <- replicate(10,run_simulation(group_size = N, ngroups = g, b = b, c = c, e = e, m = m, k = k, inmS = inmS, inmT=inmT, base = base,generations=generations))

plot(1,1,type="n",xlim=c(0,steps),ylim=c(0,1),ylab="q")
apply(resultsSC2[,1,],2,lines,lwd=1,col="red")
apply(resultsSE2[1,,],2,lines,lwd=1,col="blue")

plot(1,1,type="n",xlim=c(0,steps),ylim=c(0,1),ylab="s")
apply(resultsSC2[,3,],2,lines,lwd=1,col="red")
apply(resultsSE2[2,,],2,lines,lwd=1,col="blue")

plot(1,1,type="n",xlim=c(0,steps),ylim=c(0,1),ylab="t")
apply(resultsSC2[,2,],2,lines,lwd=1,col="red")
apply(resultsSE2[3,,],2,lines,lwd=1,col="blue")
```

```{r}
library(parallel)
insti <- list(a=c(.1,.1),b=c(.1,0),c=c(0,.1),d=c(0,0))
ks <- seq(.01,.5,length.out=6)

seeds <- sample(1:1e6,200)  
allresSC <- list()
for( i in  names(insti)){
  pii <- insti[[i]]
  testk <- sapply(ks,function(k){
    print(k)
    cl <- makeCluster(10,type="FORK")
    represults <- parSapply(cl,1:5,function(is){
       set.seed(seeds[is])  # Set a unique seed for the i-th worker
       tryCatch(mean(model(allgroups,e=e,m=m,k=k,steps=steps,s=s,t=t,c=c,b=b,baseline=baseline,mu_s=pii[1],mu_t=pii[2])[,1]),error=function(e)return(NA))
    })
    stopCluster(cl)
    represults
  })
  allresSC[[i]] <- testk
}

allresSE <- list()
for( i in  names(insti)){
  pii <- insti[[i]]
  testk <- sapply(ks,function(k){
  print(k)
  cl <- makeCluster(10,type="FORK")
    represults <- parSapply(cl,1:5,function(is){
       set.seed(seeds[is])  # Set a unique seed for the i-th worker
       tryCatch(mean(run_simulation(group_size = N, ngroups = g, b = b, c = c, e = e, m = m, k = k, inmS = pii[1], inmT=pii[2], base = base,generations=generations)[1,]),error=function(e)NA)
    })
    stopCluster(cl)
    represults
 
 })
  allresSE[[i]] <- testk
}

 ks <- seq(.01,.5,length.out=10)
plot(ks,rep(1,length(ks)),ylim=c(0,1),type="n")

allresSC=allres[[1]]
names(allresSC)=c("both","s","t","none")
allresSE=allres[[2]]
names(allresSE)=c("both","s","t","none")
par(mfrow=c(1,2))
plot(ks,rep(1,length(ks)),type="n",ylim=c(0,max(unlist(allresSC),na.rm=T)))
for( i in 1:4) lines(ks,apply(allresSC[[i]],2,mean,na.rm=T),col="orange",lty=i,lwd=3)
plot(ks,rep(1,length(ks)),type="n",ylim=c(0,max(unlist(allresSE),na.rm=T)))
for( i in 1:4) lines(ks,apply(allresSE[[i]],2,mean,na.rm=T),col="#008080",lty=i,lwd=3)
legend("topleft",legend=c("both","s","t","none"),lty=1:4,lwd=2,title="institutions")
```
